description_long: This temple features a rectangular structure with a prominent gabled roof, supported by a series of evenly spaced columns along the front and sides. The roof is steeply pitched and extends well beyond the colonnade, providing a deep overhang. The facade is defined by a classical portico with a triangular pediment, reminiscent of ancient Greek or Roman temples. The exterior is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and little visible ornamentation, emphasizing symmetry and proportion. The color palette is a uniform light beige or off-white, giving the structure a monolithic and serene appearance. The entrance is centrally located beneath the portico, framed by the colonnade, and appears wide and inviting.
description: A classical temple with a gabled roof, columned portico, and minimalist light-colored exterior. The structure is symmetrical and features a prominent triangular pediment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the columned portico, triangular pediment, and main entrance beneath the overhanging gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of columns and the deep, continuous roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view with the gabled roof and a less prominent entrance, columns visible but no portico.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the column arrangement and roof overhang seen in view 1.
attribute_ornamentation: minimalist, smooth surfaces, no visible decorative motifs
attribute_entrance_design: columned portico with a wide central entrance, framed by evenly spaced columns and topped with a triangular pediment, no visible ornamentation
